description: Fix the Reeve server deployment. SSH into root@87.99.158.18 using key ~/.ssh/id_ed25519. Do the following steps in order: 1) cd /opt/hermes-infra && git pull origin main 2) Extract OPENROUTER_API_KEY

userStories.title: Complete task
userStories.description: Fix the Reeve server deployment. SSH into root@87.99.158.18 using key ~/.ssh/id_ed25519. Do the following steps in order: 1) cd /opt/hermes-infra && git pull origin main 2) Extract OPENROUTER_API_KEY from the running reeve container: docker inspect reeve --format={{.Config.Env}} and find the OPENROUTER_API_KEY value 3) Rewrite /opt/hermes-infra/.env with: OPENROUTER_API_KEY=<the extracted value> and HERMES_CONFIG_PATH=/etc/hermes/hermes.yaml 4) docker stop reeve && docker rm reeve 5) cd /opt/hermes-infra && docker compose up -d 6) Verify: docker ps && docker logs hermes-infra-reeve-agent-1 --tail 20
acceptanceCriteria: All work described in the prompt is complete
userStories.notes: All 6 deployment steps completed. Container reeve-agent running with correct env vars.
